Auth.confirmEmailSuccess: Email confirmed. You can sign in now.
Auth.confirmEmailFailed: Email confirmation failed. Request a new link.
Auth.forgotPasswordSubmitted: If an account exists for that email, a reset link will be sent.
Auth.resetPasswordFailed: Reset failed. Request a new link.
Auth.resetPasswordTokenExpired: This reset link has expired. Request a new one.
Auth.resetPasswordTokenReused: This reset link was already used. Request a new one.
Auth.resetPasswordTokenInvalid: This reset link is invalid. Request a new one.
Auth.resetPasswordDisabled: Password reset is disabled on this server.
Auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
Auth.oauthCallbackFailedNotFound: Sign-in could not reach the API (404). Open the app via the reverse-proxy URL (same host/port as the API), or set NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL to your Spring backend and rebuild the webapp.
Auth.name: Display name
Auth.registerFailed: Could not register. Try another email.
Auth.registerLegalVersionMismatch: Could not register. Legal document versions are out of date — rebuild the webapp after updating .env.
Auth.registerVerificationRequired: Account created. Please verify your email before signing in.
Auth.registerPendingIntro: We sent a confirmation link. Open it to verify your email, then sign in.
Auth.registerPendingIntroSmtp: We sent a confirmation link to your inbox. Open it to verify your email, then sign in.
Auth.registerPendingIntroOutboxOnly: Your confirmation link was queued on the server. In local development, an administrator can read it from the mail outbox — it was not sent via email.
Auth.registerPendingResendSent: If your email is eligible, a new confirmation message will be sent.
Auth.registerPendingResendQueuedOutbox: If your email is eligible, a new confirmation link was queued again in the mail outbox.
Auth.registerPendingResendFailed: Could not resend. Try again later.
Auth.registerPendingMissingEmail: Missing email address. Go back to registration.
Auth.emailNotVerified: Email verification required. Check your inbox for a confirmation link.
Auth.networkError: Network error. Check API URL and CORS.
Auth.nameTooLong: Name must be at most 120 characters.
Auth.legalAcceptanceRequired: You must accept privacy policy and terms.

SectionActions.deleteAllProjectsUnavailable: Not available — delete projects individually from each project card.
SectionActions.deleteAllDocumentsLoadErrorHint: Fix document load errors before bulk delete.
SectionActions.deleteAllDocumentsIterativeHint: Deletes every file in this project only (sequential API calls). Requires confirmation.
SectionActions.needsActiveConversation: Open or select a chat conversation first.
SectionActions.chatActionDeferred: Available from chat controls in a future update.
SectionActions.chatDeleteUnavailable: Not available — no delete-chat API wired in the UI yet.
SectionActions.settingsFormsDeferredHint: Use each settings tab for edits; structured import/export is planned separately.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.subtitle: Configure your assistant, appearance, and language.
Settings.modelRegistryCardDescription: Recommended chat and embedding models for this app. Check availability and download missing models here. Server-wide model lists are managed by an administrator.
Settings.modelRegistryOllamaUnreachable: The local model server is unreachable — check the server or contact an administrator.
Settings.modelRegistryServerUnreachable: The model server is not reachable. Ask your administrator or try again later.
Settings.meCanonicalCardDescription: Language is stored with your account for APIs and future UI use. Theme matches light, dark, or system appearance. Extra keys from older clients remain saved until you replace them here.
Settings.mePreferencesDescription: Choose the language stored with your account (English or Español).
Settings.mePersonalizationDescription: Choose how the app should apply light or dark appearance (or follow your system setting).
Settings.meAdvancedDiagnosticsHint: Full payload returned by the server. Keys this screen does not edit stay included when you save.
Settings.meUnsupportedLocaleWarning: Your saved locale ({value}) is not available here. Pick a supported language and save to replace it.
Settings.meUnsupportedThemeWarning: Your saved theme ({value}) is not available here. Pick an option and save to replace it.
Settings.dataSummaryDescription: Totals for projects and conversations linked to your account, plus how many documents are indexed and an approximate storage size.
Settings.dataSummaryError: We couldn't load your usage summary. Wait a moment and try refreshing.
Settings.dataInventoryDescription: Indexed files across your projects—see each file's scope and processing status without opening every project.
Settings.dataInventoryError: We couldn't load your documents. Wait a moment and try refreshing.
Settings.dataInventoryEmpty: No documents yet. Upload or index files from a project's Documents area.
Settings.dataAdvancedDetails: Summary counts use the summary, the cross-project library table uses the document library (paginated).
Settings.accountExportDescription: Request a ZIP of your account data. You can leave this page while it prepares—come back here to download when ready.
Settings.accountExportNoArtifact: Export finished but no download id was returned.
Settings.accountExportPhaseQueued: Queued — waiting for the export worker.
Settings.accountExportStoppedWatchingTimeout: Stopped checking after several minutes — the export may still finish on the server.
Settings.accountExportStoppedWatchingNavigated: Stopped checking because you left this page while the export was running.
Settings.accountExportPollHint: Return to Settings → Account to refresh status, or tap Resume.
Settings.accountExportJobNotFound: That export job is no longer available. Start a new export.
Settings.accountExportTraceNavigatedAway: Account export — stopped checking after navigation
Settings.accountDeletionDescription: Queues irreversible deletion of your account and data. Confirm with your email and the exact phrase.
Settings.accountDeletionQueued: Deletion queued. You will be signed out when processing completes.
Settings.accountDeletionConfirmHint: Enter your account email and the exact confirmation phrase to enable deletion.
Settings.preferencesCardDescription: Match the console to your environment. Changes are saved in this device.
Settings.userConfigDescription: Default settings used when you start a new chat or project.
Settings.userConfigFormDescription: These defaults apply across your account until a project overrides them.
Settings.configAdvancedJsonHint: Edit the raw configuration object. Values load into the form above when you apply. Most users can ignore this section.
Settings.configJsonMustBeObject: Configuration JSON must be a single object.
Settings.configSelectedModelUnavailable: “{model}” is no longer available as a {kind} model. Choose another model or ask an administrator.
Settings.projectConfigDescription: Overrides for the currently active project. Select a project on the Projects page first.
Settings.projectConfigFormDescription: These values apply only while this project is selected. They override your personal defaults for this project's chats and documents.
Settings.projectConfigNoProject: No active project. Open Projects and activate one.
Settings.projectConfigAdvancedDetails: Under your deployment’s product API prefix: the saved override map is obtained from the project configuration. The changes are persisted and the overrides are cleared (documents and chats are not deleted).
Settings.projectConfigClearDialogDescription: This clears retrieval and model overrides stored for this project. Your personal defaults apply again next time settings merge. Documents, chats, and uploads are not deleted.
Settings.assistantProfileSectionDescription: Edit the instruction layers you can safely customize. Grounding and abstention behavior follow platform defaults and your configuration profile.
Settings.instructionsEditorScopeNote: Changes apply to your account or project defaults and are merged at runtime with your configuration profile.
Settings.instructionsSystemHint: Core assistant behavior stored in your configuration layer. Leave empty to use the platform default.
Settings.instructionsAnswerHint: Optional tone, format, and response style applied to every conversation on your account.
Settings.instructionsSourceUsageHint: Optional project guidance for how the assistant should use uploaded sources (for example domain vocabulary or citation style).
Settings.instructionsGroundingPreviewNote: Grounding follows your configuration profile, retrieval settings, and indexed documents. It is not edited as free text here.
Settings.instructionsAbstentionPreviewNote: When to decline or narrow an answer is controlled by platform safety defaults and cannot be edited here.
Settings.internalPromptsSectionDescription: Configure internal task prompts used for query rewriting, judges, verifiers, and metadata reasoning. Editors are prefilled with platform defaults.
Settings.internalPromptCatalogOnly: Reference only — configure in the linked settings section.
Settings.internalPromptsTechnicalKey: Overrides are stored under configuration key "{key}".
Settings.taskLlmSettingsDescription: Optional per-task model and temperature overrides. Leave model empty to inherit the main assistant model.
Settings.assistantBehaviorSectionDescription: Choose the model, embedding model, and retrieval settings for your assistant. Options depend on your deployment's connected providers.
Settings.modelParamsUnsupportedHint: These parameters are not applied by your active model provider in this release. Values may appear when imported from JSON.
Settings.modelParamsUnsupportedFutureWork: Additional remote-provider parameters (for example max tokens and penalties) may be supported in a future release when the chat mapper applies them.
Settings.accountGlobalPersonaHint: Optional tone and behavior applied to every conversation on your account.
Settings.projectPromptHint: Optional instructions scoped to this project (for example domain vocabulary or response style).
Settings.presetsDescription: Reusable bundles of retrieval and model settings you can pick when chatting. Built-in presets stay read-only; your presets only store keys the platform accepts.
Settings.presetsCreateDescription: Set fields below. Use Advanced only to paste JSON from another workspace or copy your draft payload.
Settings.presetsStructuredFieldsEmpty: No editable configuration fields were returned for this environment.
Settings.presetsPreviewHint: Structured overview of the preset values that will be stored after server-side filtering.
Settings.presetsImportPlaceholder: Paste one JSON object — for example keys like topK (number) and llmModel (text).
Settings.presetsImportNotObject: Imported JSON must be a single object.
Settings.presetsImportValidationFailed: Imported fields failed validation (types or ranges). Fix values and try again.
Settings.presetsExportHint: Copies the same filtered payload shown above.
Settings.presetsEmpty: No presets yet. Create one below.
Settings.configSaveError: Could not save. Check your values or contact an administrator.
Settings.configSchemaEmpty: No settings are available to edit here.

Lab.compactHomeLead: Pick a workflow, configure the run, then export results.
Lab.compactHomeHelpBody: Upload a workbook on this page or use the built-in reference data. Each evaluation page shows what is missing before you can run.
Lab.compactCardLlmTagline: Compare chat models on Q/A items.
Lab.llmEvalTagline: Compare chat models on a validated workbook.
Lab.embeddingEvalTagline: Compare embedding models on retrieval queries.
Lab.ragEvalTagline: Run retrieval configurations with source documents.
Lab.classifierTagline: Train and evaluate the query classifier.
Lab.controlPanelDescription: Prepare datasets, run a workflow, export results.
Lab.step1Body: Use the internal reference workbook when available, or download a template and upload a typed experimental workbook until it validates as VALID.
Lab.step2Body: Open one workflow and run a job using a compatible VALID dataset. Results and exports appear automatically after completion.
Lab.step3Body: After the job completes, the page loads a results panel with summary, per-item rows, and export buttons.
Lab.step3Hint: Exports show up in the results panel after a successful run: items.csv, items.json, and rollups.json.
Lab.datasetCompatibilityLlm: LLM baseline workbook or built-in reference data
Lab.datasetCompatibilityEmbedding: Embedding baseline workbook or built-in reference data
Lab.datasetCompatibilityRag: Retrieval configuration workbook or built-in reference data
Lab.datasetBlockedDemo: This dataset is a development sample and is not valid for this evaluation.
Lab.benchmarkNeedsValidDataset: This dataset is not VALID — upload/fix the workbook until validation passes, then run again.
Lab.flowLlmBody: Compare LLM models with a controlled generation profile against a Q/A dataset.
Lab.flowLlmDataset: LLM baseline workbook or built-in reference data.
Lab.flowLlmOutput: Per-question scores by model, query type, and difficulty.
Lab.flowEmbeddingBody: Compare embedding models by measuring retrieval quality over labelled chunks.
Lab.flowEmbeddingDataset: Embedding baseline workbook with queries and chunk registry.
Lab.flowEmbeddingOutput: Recall@K, MRR, latency, and retrieval diagnostics (when available).
Lab.flowRagBody: Compare retrieval configurations against your evaluation workbook. Some configurations require multi-turn chat and cannot run in this benchmark.
Lab.flowRagDataset: Retrieval configuration workbook or built-in reference data.
Lab.flowRagOutput: Per-preset results such as completed, skipped, or failed runs.
Lab.guidedStepDatasetHint: Use the reference bundle when available, or upload an experimental workbook and confirm validation.
Lab.guidedStepConfigLlmHint: Select an optional LLM model tag override for this run.
Lab.guidedStepConfigEmbeddingHint: Choose embedding models; each model may need its own prepared index before retrieval scoring.
Lab.guidedStepConfigRagHint: Attach evaluation documents if needed; the system prepares search indexes before scoring presets.
Lab.guidedStepSelectionModelsHint: Keep defaults, or pick a dataset tailored for the candidates you want to compare.
Lab.guidedStepSelectionRagHint: Select presets supported by this benchmark type.
Lab.guidedStepRunHint: Start the evaluation and follow live progress on this page.
Lab.guidedStepResultsHint: When the job finishes, review scores, outcome counts, and per-question rows.
Lab.guidedStepAuthHint: This page requires a signed-in session. If you see a permissions error, sign in again and retry.
Lab.guidedStepExportHint: Export CSV and JSON bundles from the results panel.
Lab.llmBaselineIntro: Compare LLM models with a controlled generation configuration against a Q/A dataset.
Lab.llmEvalEmptyHint: Upload an LLM baseline workbook or use the reference bundle, then select one or more chat models to compare.
Lab.embeddingBaselineIntro: Compare embedding models by measuring how well they retrieve labelled chunks.
Lab.embeddingEvalEmptyHint: Upload an embedding baseline workbook, attach evaluation documents if needed, and pick embedding models to compare.
Lab.ragPresetBenchmarkIntro: Evaluate retrieval configurations and export run outcomes.
Lab.ragEvalEmptyHint: Upload a retrieval configuration workbook, add source documents to the knowledge base, and select configurations — the system prepares search indexes automatically before scoring.
Lab.ragPresetExplainerCore: Core evaluation profiles for benchmark comparisons.
Lab.ragPresetExplainerAdvanced: Advanced profiles may require extra capabilities.
Lab.ragPresetExplainerNotSupported: Not supported means this environment cannot run that preset yet—not an error in your workbook.
Lab.title: Research Lab
Lab.subtitle: Run evaluations and classifier experiments. What you can do depends on how this environment is configured.
Lab.layoutAdrNote: Lab outputs are experiment reports — apply changes to presets or production config only via explicit actions elsewhere.
Lab.statusEnabledTooltip: This evaluation type is enabled on the server.
Lab.statusTypedDatasetKindsLine: Reference workbook — LLM rows: {llm}, embedding queries: {emb}, RAG preset rows: {rag}
Lab.statusCountsUnavailable: Reference workbook counts not available from this response.
Lab.referenceBundleMissingHint: The server did not find the packaged reference Excel resource — uploads still work, but built-in reference rows may be unavailable.
Lab.referenceBundleInvalidHint: The workbook is present but did not pass validation — fix issues below or rely on an uploaded experimental workbook.
Lab.referenceBundleIssuesNone: No validation issues reported for the reference workbook.
Lab.overviewUploadedDatasetsCounts: {custom} uploads by you · {total} total listed (includes packaged rows)
Lab.overviewUploadedDatasetsEmpty: No datasets listed yet — download a template below and upload an .xlsx file.
Lab.jobAlreadyRunning: Another Lab evaluation is already running. Cancel it or wait for it to finish.
Lab.labRecoveryMultipleTitle: Multiple active jobs match this benchmark.
Lab.labRecoveryMultipleHint: Choose one to resume progress. Cancel unneeded jobs from the Lab banner or wait for them to finish.
Lab.jobCancelTooLate: Could not cancel because the job already finished.
Lab.statusDatasetsHint: The packaged reference workbook is missing or did not pass validation. Upload a compatible experimental workbook from the templates below, or ask an administrator to fix the reference bundle.
Lab.statusClassifierHint: Training and classification need the classifier service reachable from the app backend.
Lab.statusServerMessageQualifier: Additional detail from the Lab status API.
Lab.experimentalDatasetDescription: Download a template and upload a typed evaluation workbook.
Lab.adrDisclaimer: Lab results are reports only. Nothing here writes production presets or project config unless you do that explicitly in Settings or Admin.
Lab.syncModeLabel: Return the full result in this tab (skip progress updates)
Lab.labAdvancedEvalHelp: Choose a dataset, attach documents when required, select models or presets, and run the evaluation. Progress and results appear on this page.
Lab.labEvalTechnicalHint: Evaluation type and saved run reference appear below when relevant.
Lab.labEvalAddDocuments: Add documents to run this evaluation.
Lab.labEvalIndexWillPrepare: The system will prepare the required index before running.
Lab.labEvalIndexPrepareFailed: The system could not prepare the required index.
Lab.labCorpusHelpDocumentCentric: Add documents for this evaluation. Indexes are prepared automatically when you run.

presetSupportStatus.notSupported: This preset is not supported in this environment.
presetSupportStatus.requiresMultiTurn: This preset is not available for this evaluation type. Use Chat for multi-turn flows.

Lab.labDeveloperClassifierHelp: Classifier train and evaluate accept spreadsheet uploads. Large jobs run in the background with live progress; synchronous mode is for small tests only.
Lab.labAdvancedClassifierJobHelp: Training and evaluation upload spreadsheets. Large jobs run in the background with live progress; use synchronous mode only for small tests.
Lab.projectScopeNone: No active project selected — runs use global defaults.
Lab.datasetsDisabledWarn: The packaged reference workbook is not fully ready in this deployment (see Overview → Internal reference workbook). You can still run a benchmark if you uploaded a compatible experimental workbook.
Lab.benchmarkNeedsCompatibleDataset: Pick or upload a workbook that matches this benchmark — LLM baseline for LLM runs, embedding baseline for embedding runs, or RAG preset workbook for preset benchmarks (reference bundles count too when listed).
Lab.labCorpusHelp: Add documents to the knowledge base for this benchmark. You do not need an active project — upload files here or reuse documents from a project. Indexes are prepared automatically when you run.
Lab.labCorpusDeleteFailed: Could not remove the document from the knowledge base.
Lab.labCorpusRefreshFailed: Could not refresh the knowledge base list.
Lab.labCorpusClearAllConfirm: Remove all documents from this knowledge base?
Lab.labCorpusClearAllFailed: Could not clear the knowledge base.
Lab.labKbDuplicateFile: A document with this filename is already in the knowledge base.
Lab.labCorpusUploadLabel: Upload documents to the knowledge base
Lab.labCorpusUploadFailed: Could not upload the document to the knowledge base.
Lab.labCorpusUploadPartialFailed: Some files could not be uploaded: {details}
Lab.labCorpusFileTooLarge: File is too large for the server upload limit.
Lab.labCorpusUnsupportedType: Unsupported file type for knowledge base upload.
Lab.labCorpusAttachFailed: Could not attach project documents to the knowledge base.
Lab.labCorpusNoProjectDocuments: The selected project has no shared documents to attach.
Lab.benchmarkNeedsCorpus: Add at least one document to the knowledge base before running this benchmark.
Lab.embeddingCampaignNeedsProject: Select a project before running an embedding model comparison so indexes can be resolved per model.
Lab.embeddingCampaignMissingSnapshots: No prepared search index for: {models}. Rebuild or prepare the project index for each embedding model, then run again.
Lab.benchmarkCorpusNotReady: Wait until at least one knowledge base document is ready before running.
Lab.labKbNotFound: The selected knowledge base does not exist or you do not have access.
Lab.labKbLoadFailed: Could not load the knowledge base.
Lab.labKbCreateFailed: Could not create the knowledge base.
Lab.labCorpusStale: The saved knowledge base was removed or is no longer available. A new one will be created when you upload.
Lab.labCorpusAttachNoSharedDocuments: This project has no ready shared documents to attach. Upload files here or share documents from the project Documents page.
Lab.labCorpusAttachIndexProjectHint: Documents added to the internal Lab index project must be uploaded through this knowledge base panel.
Lab.labCorpusImportHintNoProject: Select an active project in the header to import shared project documents.
Lab.labImportDocumentNotFound: The selected project document could not be found.
Lab.labImportScopeNotShared: Only project-shared documents can be imported. Upload to the project as shared or upload directly here.
Lab.labImportBinaryMissing: The document has no stored file in the project. Re-upload it there first.
Lab.userError_NO_ACTIVE_SNAPSHOT: The system will prepare the required index before running.
Lab.userError_RUNTIME_CONFIG_SNAPSHOT_UNAVAI: Could not resolve configuration for the knowledge base search index.
Lab.userError_NO_COMPATIBLE_SNAPSHOT: No compatible search index exists for the current configuration.
Lab.userError_SNAPSHOT_INCOMPATIBLE: The selected search index is incompatible or has no indexed content.
Lab.labKbEmpty: The knowledge base has no documents. Upload at least one before evaluating.
Lab.labKbNoReadyDocuments: No documents are ready in the knowledge base yet. Wait for processing to finish.
Lab.labEmbeddingDimensionMismatch: The selected embedding model does not match this deployment's vector store width. Choose a compatible model in Admin.
Lab.labModelAvailabilityBlocked: Not enough compatible models are installed for a comparison run. Check Admin → Models.
Lab.labKbDocumentProcessingFailed: One or more documents failed to process. Check the list and re-upload if needed.
Lab.userError_BLOCKED_BY_MODEL_AVAILABILITY: Select at least two available models installed on the server to run a comparison.
Lab.userError_BLOCKED_BY_MODEL_AVAILABILITY_: Select at least two models configured in the API catalog to run a comparison.
Lab.userError_EMBEDDING_DIMENSION_MISMATCH: This embedding model is not compatible with the current vector index.
Lab.userError_EMBEDDING_DIMENSION_UNAVAILABL: Could not determine the embedding model dimensions for this deployment.
Lab.userError_NO_DOCUMENTS: Add documents to run this evaluation.
Lab.userError_DOCUMENT_PROCESSING_FAILED: One or more documents failed to process. Check the list and re-upload if needed.
Lab.userError_FAILED_STALE_INGESTION: Ingestion took too long. You can retry.
Lab.userError_MODEL_UNAVAILABLE: The selected model is unavailable. Choose another model or verify it is installed.
Lab.userError_MODEL_UNAVAILABLE_OLLAMA: The selected model is not available on the local model server. Install or verify it, then try again.
Lab.userError_MODEL_UNAVAILABLE_OPENAI: The selected model is unavailable on the configured API. Verify the model id or proxy settings.
Lab.userError_INFERENCE_UNAVAILABLE: The AI service is unavailable. Check your model provider and try again.
Lab.userError_INFERENCE_UNAVAILABLE_OLLAMA: The AI service is unavailable. Check that the local model server is running and models are installed, then try again.
Lab.userError_INFERENCE_UNAVAILABLE_OPENAI: The AI inference service is unavailable. Check that the configured LLM API is reachable, then try again.
Lab.userError_VALIDATION_GENERIC: Check this field and try again.
Lab.userError_VALIDATION_ACTION: Correct the highlighted field and try again.
Lab.userError_INFERENCE_ACTION: Check your model provider and try again.
Lab.userError_INFERENCE_ACTION_OLLAMA: Start the local model server, install the required models, then try again.
Lab.userError_INFERENCE_ACTION_OPENAI: Verify the LLM API endpoint, credentials, and model id, then try again.
Lab.userError_INDEX_ACTION: Wait for index preparation to finish or retry from Lab after fixing documents.
Lab.userError_DOCUMENTS_ACTION: Review document status in the knowledge base and re-upload failed files if needed.
Lab.userError_DATASET_INVALID: The dataset is not valid. Check the template.
Lab.labRagSnapshotPreparationFailed: Could not prepare the search index for retrieval evaluation. Check ready documents and embedding models.
Lab.ragEvalHelp: Retrieval evaluation uses the configured pipeline as set in Settings — it does not silently change production configuration.
Lab.llmEvalDescription: Run the LLM benchmark and export results.
Lab.ragEvalDescription: Run the retrieval configuration benchmark and export results.
Lab.embeddingEvalDescription: Run the embedding benchmark and export results.
Lab.embeddingEvalHelp: Uses the embedding baseline workbook columns — selecting “Follow-up answer” runs an extra generation step after retrieval scores.
Lab.classifierDescription: Upload spreadsheets to train or score models, or send a quick classify request when the service is ready.
Lab.benchmarkDatasetStaleMissingOption: Previously selected dataset no longer exists ({id})
Lab.evalDraftWarningsTitle: Saved Lab draft issues — fix before running
Lab.evalDraftWarnDatasetMissing: The selected workbook no longer exists in this deployment — choose another.
Lab.evalDraftWarnDatasetIncompatible: The saved workbook is not compatible with this benchmark tab — pick one listed below.
Lab.evalDraftWarnLlmInvalid: Saved chat model is not available in the evaluation catalog: {modelId}
Lab.evalDraftWarnLlmInvalidOpenAI: Saved chat model is not available in the configured API catalog: {modelId}
Lab.evalDraftWarnLlmListInvalid: Saved chat models are not available in the evaluation catalog: {models}
Lab.evalDraftWarnLlmListInvalidOpenAI: Saved chat models are not available in the configured API catalog: {models}
Lab.evalDraftWarnEmbeddingInvalid: Saved embedding model is not available in the evaluation catalog: {modelId}
Lab.evalDraftWarnEmbeddingInvalidOpenAI: Saved embedding model is not available in the configured API catalog: {modelId}
Lab.evalDraftWarnEmbeddingListInvalid: Saved embedding models are not available in the evaluation catalog: {models}
Lab.evalDraftWarnEmbeddingListInvalidOpenAI: Saved embedding models are not available in the configured API catalog: {models}
Lab.evalDraftWarnPresetsUnknown: Preset identifier(s) are unknown after catalog reload or workbook changes: {codes}
Lab.evalDraftWarnPresetsNotLabSelectable: Some saved presets cannot run in this evaluation: {codes}. Remove them or pick others.
Lab.evalDraftPresetsSanitized: Some saved presets are not available for this evaluation type and were removed.
Lab.labConfigNoPresets: Select at least one preset before starting.
Lab.labConfigUnsupportedPreset: This evaluation preset is not supported.
Lab.labConfigNotSingleTurn: This preset is not available for this evaluation type.
Lab.labConfigP13: This preset is not available for this evaluation type. Use Chat for multi-turn flows.
Lab.labConfigP14: This preset is not available for this evaluation type. Use Chat for multi-turn flows.
Lab.labConfigInvalidFeatures: The runtime configuration combines incompatible features.
Lab.labConfigRequiresIndex: A compatible index is required before running this evaluation.
Lab.labConfigRequiresSnapshot: A compatible search index is required for the selected configuration.
Lab.labConfigNotImplemented: A requested runtime feature is not implemented in this deployment.
Lab.labConfigAdvisorRetrieval: Advisor requires retrieval to be enabled.
Lab.labConfigStructuredSearch: Structured search cannot be combined with retrieval.
Lab.evalDraftRunNamePlaceholder: Displayed inside benchmark summaries when supported
Lab.evalDraftLastRunHint: Your last started run is remembered in this browser (reference: {runId}).
Lab.evalCatalogLoadError: Could not load evaluation model catalog.
Lab.evalCatalogNoChatModels: No chat models are configured in the backend catalog — evaluation cannot start.
Lab.evalCatalogNoCompatibleEmbeddings: No embedding model compatible with the vector store is configured — evaluation cannot start.
Lab.benchmarkPromptProfileInfo: Prompt wording follows the Lab baseline profile on the server. Adjust chat presets separately under Settings — this screen records overrides only as model tags on the evaluation run.
Lab.benchmarkRagPresetCatalogInfo: Some presets require multi-turn flows and are not available in this benchmark.
Lab.benchmarkLlmModelPlaceholder: e.g. llama3.2:latest — overrides default only for this run
Lab.benchmarkLlmMultiHint: Select two or more models to run a side-by-side model comparison (one run per model). A single selection runs as one benchmark run.
Lab.noLlmModelsAvailable: No chat models available. Add and verify models in Admin first.
Lab.labLlmBlockedByModelAvailability: Model comparison needs at least two available chat models.
Lab.labLlmBlockedByModelAvailabilityOpenAI: Model comparison needs at least two chat models from the configured API catalog.
Lab.labEmbeddingBlockedByModelAvailability: At least two compatible embedding models are required for comparison.
Lab.labEmbeddingBlockedByModelAvailabilityOp: At least two embedding models from the configured API catalog are required for comparison.
Lab.noEmbeddingModelsAvailable: No embedding models available. Add one in Admin Models and validate/pull it first.
Lab.benchmarkEmbeddingMultiHint: Select two or more embedding models to compare retrieval quality (one run per model, each with its own search index when required).
Lab.benchmarkEmbeddingDownstreamLabel: Also run a simple answer step after retrieval (uses more tokens)
Lab.benchmarkExperimentalPresetsHint: Select two or more presets to run a preset comparison (one run per preset). Leave all unchecked to run the full workbook catalog as a single run.
Lab.benchmarkSingleRunNote: Evaluate selected model — results appear as one run, not a side-by-side comparison.
Lab.benchmarkExperimentalPresetsEmpty: No evaluation presets were returned by the catalog.
Lab.failedJobResultsUnavailable: No results are available for this failed run. Review the error details below.
Lab.benchmarkResultsExecutedSummary: Executed rows used for score averages: {n} · mean exact-match score {exact}
Lab.benchmarkCampaignRunsHint: A campaign produces one run per comparison axis value (model, preset, or embedding). Use exports for merged comparison tables.
Lab.benchmarkCampaignComparisonEmpty: Run a campaign with at least two models or presets to see comparison.
Lab.benchmarkCampaignComparisonHint: Summary rows aggregate metrics per axis value (sorted by exact match). Use summary.csv for spreadsheets and items.csv for per-question detail.
Lab.benchmarkTrendEmpty: Not enough scored rows to plot a trend yet. For multi-model campaigns, compare models in the table above or export results.
Lab.benchmarkTrendHint: Bars show answerable score when available, otherwise mean correctness for executed rows
Lab.benchmarkPerItemTruncated: Showing first 80 of {n} rows — use exports for the full table.
Lab.benchmarkColAnswerableScoreTooltip: Primary score: answer quality on answerable items only.
Lab.benchmarkColGlobalScoreTooltip: Blended score across answerability groups; may differ from answerable score.
Lab.benchmarkScoreInterpretationHint: Answerable score reflects answer-quality on answerable items. Exact match is a separate metric and may differ from the blended global export score.
Lab.benchmarkExtensionLegend: Multi-turn presets may require Chat instead of this benchmark and can appear separately in results.
Lab.benchmarkMetricReasonNoRetrieval: Not applicable — this benchmark has no retrieval step.
Lab.benchmarkMetricReasonNoJudge: Not available — the judge did not score this item.
Lab.benchmarkMetricReasonRunFailed: Not available — the run failed before generation completed.
Lab.benchmarkMetricReasonRunIncomplete: Not available — the item did not reach generation.
Lab.benchmarkMetricReasonSkipped: Not applicable — item was skipped or not supported.
Lab.benchmarkMetricReasonRetrievalNa: Not applicable — retrieval metrics do not apply to this row.
Lab.classifierNotConfiguredWarn: Classifier is not configured in the backend — train/eval/classify will fail until classifier-service is wired.
Lab.jobStopConfirmDescription: Job {jobId} will stop after the current step. Partial results stay available.
Lab.jobStopConfirmDescriptionGeneric: The evaluation will stop after the current step. Partial results stay available.
Lab.jobCancelled: Live updates paused — the evaluation may still be running. Press Resume watching or run again.
Lab.jobPollTimeout: Live updates paused after a long wait — the job may still be running. Press Resume watching or check Activity.
Lab.jobUiFinishedAway: The job finished while you were away.
Lab.jobUiCompleted: Job finished — see outcome summary below
Lab.jobUiNoItemsExecutedDetail: No benchmark items ran — check knowledge base, models, and preset compatibility.
Lab.jobBenchmarkClosureLine: Closure: {executed} executed, {failed} failed, {skipped} skipped, {notSupported} not supported (expected {expected}).
Lab.benchmarkClosureFailedValidation: Validation failed (item counts do not match)
Lab.benchmarkNoExecutedItemsSummary: No items were executed. Check models, knowledge base documents, and preset compatibility.
Lab.benchmarkScopeNoExecutedItems: No items were executed for this selection.
Lab.benchmarkCampaignPartialSummary: Campaign totals: {executed} executed, {skipped} skipped, {failed} failed, {notSupported} not supported.
Lab.benchmarkCampaignScopeHint: Select a comparison row to focus results on one preset or model.
Lab.benchmarkSkipIndexPrepareFailed: The required index could not be prepared.
Lab.benchmarkSkipPresetCannotRunDocuments: This preset could not run with the current documents.
Lab.jobUiStoppedWaiting: Live updates paused — evaluation may still be running
Lab.jobStoppedWaitingNoId: Updates paused before a job id was assigned.
Lab.traceStoppedWaiting: Paused live updates for lab job
Lab.jobRecoveryStale: Lab job {jobId} is no longer available on the server (expired or cleared). Remove it from this browser session.
Lab.jobRecoveryStaleShort: That lab job no longer exists on the server.
Lab.jobRecoveryStoppedWaiting: Lab job {jobId} — reconnecting to live updates. Open the section to resume if needed.
Lab.jobRecoveryInflight: Lab job {jobId} is still in progress — resume watching from the right Lab section.
Lab.jobRecoveryCompleted: Lab job {jobId} completed successfully — open the Lab section to review results.
Lab.jobRecoveryTerminalOther: Lab job {jobId} finished with status {status} — open the Lab section for details.
Lab.jobRecoverySessionExpired: Your session expired. Sign in again, then use Resume watching or reopen this section to recover the evaluation.
Lab.backgroundJobBannerLabel: Lab job {jobId} may still be running — live updates are paused in this browser session. Open the Lab section and use Resume watching when offered, or start the job again if needed.
Lab.registryDescription: Models saved after successful training. Activate one for the current project to attach it to that workspace explicitly.
Lab.registryEmpty: No models registered yet. Run a successful training job first.
Lab.registryConfirmBody: Project "{project}" will use inference tag "{tag}" as classifierModelId in its configuration. Chat and classification for this project will use this model.
Lab.registryNoProject: Select an active project first (Projects menu).

Admin.title: Administration
Admin.subtitle: Restricted to ADMIN role in the backend.
Admin.catalogDescription: Models declared in server configuration. Local server rows may show live install status; configured API rows use the remote catalog without probing the local server.
Admin.catalogEmptySection: No models configured in this section.
Admin.catalogRuntimeUnavailableOpenAI: Configured in API catalog but reported unavailable
Admin.catalogRuntimeNotProbedNote: Configured in catalog; remote provider runtime was not probed.
Admin.catalogIndexingDisabledTooltip: Cannot be used for indexing or evaluation until compatible with the vector store and available at runtime.
Admin.allowlistDescription: Model administration with local install check and optional download.
Admin.modelCheckSummaryAvailable: {modelId} is installed locally and ready as {type}.
Admin.modelCheckSummaryMissing: {modelId} is not installed locally. You can pull it or disable the allowlist entry.
Admin.modelCheckSummaryProbeFailed: {modelId} is installed but failed the {type} probe: {reason}
Admin.allowlistDeleteDisabled: Entry disabled because past evaluations reference it.
Admin.probeNotInstalled: Model is not installed on the local model server.
Admin.probeEmbeddingFailed: Model is installed but did not pass the embedding check.
Admin.probePullFailed: Could not download the model from the local model server.
Admin.probeOllamaUnreachable: The local model server is not reachable from the backend.
Admin.pullDescription: Runs as a background job and polls status — avoids blocking the admin UI during long pulls.

Projects.title: Projects
Projects.subtitle: Pick or create a workspace for documents and chat.
Projects.createDescription: Name your workspace. You can change details later.
Projects.indexCapabilitiesDisclaimer: These settings affect how documents are indexed and may require reindexing later.

Projects.embeddingCatalogLoadError: Could not load embedding model catalog.
Projects.name: Name
Projects.projectNameTooLong: Project name must be 120 characters or fewer.
Projects.configurePromptsAfterCreateHint: After creating the project, configure assistant and internal task prompts in
Projects.empty: No projects yet. Create one to get started.
Projects.noActiveSelectionHint: No workspace is selected yet. Use Open project to jump to chat for that workspace, or Set active only to choose what Chat and Documents use.
Projects.cardNoChatsYet: No chats yet — start one below or open the project.
Projects.cardChatsLoadError: Could not load chats for this project.
Projects.cardChatsStaleHint: This card shows chats in the project, but the list came back empty. Try Browse chats or refresh.
Projects.cardNoDocumentsYet: No documents yet — open Browse documents to upload.
Projects.cardDocumentsSummaryFallback: Documents are listed in the Documents section.
Projects.createActivateWarning: Project created. Activation did not complete — select it from the list if it is not active yet.
Projects.createReconciledWarning: Project created. The list was refreshed after a slow or interrupted response.
Projects.editModelConfigHint: To change chat or embedding models for this project, open
Projects.deleteDescription: Permanently delete "{name}"? Documents and conversations in this project may be removed.

Chat.title: Chat
Chat.body: Streaming assistant chat will appear here in a future update.
Chat.noActiveProject: No project is selected. Choose a workspace on Projects.
Chat.newConversationDisabledHint: Select or create a project to start a new conversation.
Chat.newConversationWizardDescription: Choose preset and document scope before the first message.
Chat.wizardPickDocsError: Select at least one READY document or switch to all documents.
Chat.wizardNoReadyDocs: No READY documents yet. Upload files first or choose all documents.
Chat.emptyConversationAdjustHint: No messages yet — you can still adjust preset and runtime options from the ⋮ menu before sending.
Chat.placeholder: Message… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline)
Chat.sourcesEmptyExplanation: No sources were returned for this answer. This is expected for direct/no-retrieval modes or controlled abstentions; otherwise inspect trace and runtime configuration.
Chat.sourcesEmptyShort: No sources available for this answer.
Chat.chatPresetNotSelectable: Not selectable in Chat for this configuration.
Chat.chatPresetRequiresCompatibleIndex: Create or reindex the project with a compatible index profile.
Chat.chatPresetRequiresMetadata: Create or reindex the project with metadata support enabled.
Chat.chatClassifierFallbackUnavailable: Classifier was unavailable; a fallback path was used.
Chat.chatClassifierFallbackInvalidOutput: Classifier returned invalid output; a fallback path was used.
Chat.sourceAlternativeOnly: Nearby acta only — not used as answer support for the requested date.
Chat.sourceNotSupportingAnswer: This source did not support the final answer.
Chat.modelsCatalogEmpty: No chat models are configured for your LLM provider.
Chat.modelSelectionInvalid: Selected model "{modelId}" is not in the catalog. Choose a valid model.
Chat.runtimeEffectiveHint: Authoritative merged values from preset, project, and conversation scope.
Chat.runtimeEffectiveCollapsedHint: Expand advanced configuration to inspect or export technical runtime values.
Chat.runtimeBaseHint: Preset + project cascade without manual conversation overrides.
Chat.modelsLoadErrorAuth: Sign in again to load the models catalog.
Chat.modelsLoadErrorGateway: Cannot reach the API (gateway or server). Check the backend and reverse proxy.
Chat.ollamaUnreachable: The local model server is not reachable; the catalog may be incomplete.
Chat.chatTitleHelp: Adjust model, preset, and document scope from the chat menu (⋮).
Chat.memoryActiveBadge: Conversation memory is enabled for this conversation (conversation-scoped condensation when configured).
Chat.clarificationPendingBanner: Waiting for your reply to clarify the request.
Chat.conversationNotFound: Conversation not found in the selected project.
Chat.presetCatalogEmpty: No presets are available. Create one in Settings or ask an administrator.
Chat.presetExperimentalHint: Evaluation presets from the catalog. Presets marked NOT_SUPPORTED are visible but disabled in this environment.
Chat.presetsExperimentalLoadError: Could not load evaluation preset catalog.
Chat.chatEmbeddingModelReadOnlyHint: Tied to the search index. Change it in project settings and rebuild the index to apply.
Chat.configScopeLegend: Settings cascade from your account defaults, then the active project, then this conversation.
Chat.chatInstructionsEditInSettingsHint: Edit full assistant instructions in Settings. This conversation uses the merged effective instructions below.
Chat.chatPromptConfigSummary: Effective assistant instructions for this conversation. Internal task prompts inherit from your project configuration when set.
Chat.chatInstructionsEmpty: No custom instructions in the effective configuration.
Chat.chatDateGroundingWarning: Date grounding warning: requested {date} did not have an exact supported source.
Chat.chatSourceDateMismatch: Source date differs from requested date {date}.
Chat.chatConfigInvalidOpenPanel: Open Assistant configuration to resolve it.
Chat.chatConfigReindexRequiredTitle: Reindex required for this configuration profile.
Chat.chatConfigReindexRequiredBody: The saved configuration state does not satisfy this profile's index requirements. Reindex the project or pick a compatible profile.
Chat.chatConfigIndexCapabilityLockedReason: Changing this requires a new search index (reindex) or a compatible project profile.
Chat.limitDocumentsNoReadyHint: No READY documents in this project. Wait for indexing or add documents before limiting retrieval.
Chat.documentsSheetScope: Project: {project}. Uploads go to this project.
Chat.documentsSheetLimitHint: When “Limit retrieval to selected documents” is on, only checked files are used for RAG. Clearing it uses every READY document in the project.
Chat.documentsSheetLimitOffHint: Turn on limit retrieval above to constrain answers to specific documents.
Chat.documentsUploadAddedToProjectHint: File uploaded to this project. Turn on limit retrieval to narrow responses to selected documents.
Chat.documentsUploadProcessingHint: File uploaded; indexing is in progress. It appears here when READY.
Chat.moveConversationDescription: This conversation will appear under the destination project. Only documents uploaded for this chat move with it, not shared project documents.
Chat.deleteConversationDescription: This permanently deletes "{title}" and its messages. This cannot be undone.
Chat.sidebarCollapsedHint: Conversation list hidden. Use the button to show it again.
Chat.assistantJobFailedShort: The assistant could not finish this reply.
Chat.chatJobFailure_CHAT_DOCUMENT_SCOPE_EMPTY: None of the selected documents are available in this project. Clear “Limit retrieval” or choose documents that are indexed.
Chat.chatJobFailure_CHAT_DOCUMENT_FILTER_INVA: The document selection contains invalid ids. Refresh the page or clear the selection.
Chat.chatJobFailure_KNOWLEDGE_SNAPSHOT_UNAVAI: Search index is not ready for this chat. Try again after indexing finishes or contact support if it persists.
Chat.chatJobFailure_NO_DOCUMENTS: This project has no documents. Add meeting-minute documents before using a retrieval preset.
Chat.chatJobFailure_NO_READY_DOCUMENTS: Documents exist, but none are READY yet. Wait for ingestion/indexing or fix failed documents.
Chat.chatJobFailure_NO_COMPATIBLE_SNAPSHOT: Source documents exist, but no compatible search index matches this configuration. Prepare or reindex the project.
Chat.chatJobFailure_SNAPSHOT_INCOMPATIBLE: The active search index is incompatible with this configuration. Pick a compatible preset or reindex.
Chat.chatJobFailure_REINDEX_REQUIRED: This configuration requires a new compatible search index. Reindex or prepare before sending.
Chat.chatJobFailure_REINDEX_IN_PROGRESS: Reindexing is in progress. Wait until the search index is ready before sending.
Chat.chatJobFailure_REINDEX_FAILED: Reindexing failed. Review the document/index error and retry preparation.
Chat.chatJobFailure_MODEL_UNAVAILABLE: The selected LLM model is unavailable. Choose another model or verify it with your provider.
Chat.chatJobFailure_MODEL_UNAVAILABLE_OLLAMA: The selected model is unavailable. Choose another model or verify it on the local model server.
Chat.chatJobFailure_MODEL_UNAVAILABLE_OPENAI: The selected model is unavailable on the configured API. Verify the model id or proxy settings.
Chat.chatJobFailure_CLASSIFIER_UNAVAILABLE: The selected classifier model is unavailable. Choose another classifier or disable classifier-dependent behavior.
Chat.chatJobFailure_DATE_MISMATCH: No source matched the requested acta date exactly. The assistant will not answer from a different date.
Chat.chatJobFailure_NO_EXACT_ACTA_DATE: No exact acta/source exists for the requested date. Use nearby actas only as alternatives, not as the answer.
Chat.chatJobFailure_LLM_UNAVAILABLE: The AI service is unavailable. Check your model provider and try again.
Chat.chatJobFailure_LLM_UNAVAILABLE_OLLAMA: The AI service is unavailable. Check that the local model server is running and models are installed, then retry.
Chat.chatJobFailure_LLM_UNAVAILABLE_OPENAI: The AI inference service is unavailable. Check that the configured LLM API is reachable, then retry.
Chat.chatJobFailure_UNSUPPORTED_RUNTIME_CONFI: This preset requires capabilities that are not available. Pick another preset or disable the unsupported evaluation preset.
Chat.chatJobFailure_INTERNAL_ERROR: Something went wrong while generating a reply. Please retry.
Chat.traceMessageSubmitFailed: Could not reach the server for this message
Chat.chatConfigIndexProfileReindexHint: Index profile values require reindexing to change.
Chat.chatValidation_TOOLS_FUNCTION_CALLING_PR: Function calling is used when both tools and function calling are enabled.

presetDisplay.P0Description: Answers from indexed document text without dense retrieval.
presetDisplay.P1Description: Injects budgeted snapshot chunks into the prompt without dense retrieval.
presetDisplay.P4Description: Chunk-level retrieval enriched with document metadata.
presetDisplay.P5Description: Retrieval with query expansion and named-entity signals.
presetDisplay.P6Description: Retrieval stack with extended reasoning enabled.
presetDisplay.P7Description: Chunk retrieval plus deterministic metadata tools.
presetDisplay.P8Description: Hybrid retrieval with ranker and post-retrieval processing.
presetDisplay.P9Description: Hybrid stack with backend function calling.
presetDisplay.P10Description: Hybrid retrieval with retrieval advisor packing.
presetDisplay.P11Description: Hybrid retrieval with adaptive route selection.
presetDisplay.P12Description: Hybrid retrieval with post-answer quality judge.
presetDisplay.P15Description: Hybrid retrieval, backend function calling, and adaptive route composition.

Documents.title: Documents
Documents.subtitle: Upload files for the active project. Ingestion runs in the background.
Documents.indexChangeRequiresReindex: Changing these capabilities later requires reindexing.
Documents.noActiveProject: No project is selected. Choose a workspace on Projects.
Documents.uploadErrorOllamaNotReady: The local model server is not ready (models downloading or unreachable).
Documents.uploadErrorDuplicate: A document with the same filename already exists.
Documents.uploadErrorUnauthorized: You are not authorized. Please sign in again.
Documents.uploadErrorGateway: Cannot reach the API (gateway or server). Check the backend and reverse proxy.
Documents.deleteAllDescription: This removes every document in “{name}” from the server. Chat history may keep references; retrieval will no longer use these files.
Documents.deleteAllTechnicalNote: There is no bulk-delete endpoint — the app deletes each document one by one for this project only.

Explain.empty: Send a message to see classification and pipeline metadata here.

Activity.sheetDescription: Recent steps and contextual details for this workspace.

Help.chatControlsMessage: Model, preset, retrieval limits, move chat, and delete chat live in the three-dot menu in the top toolbar.
Help.chatControlsDetails: Open Chat actions (⋮) next to Activity — settings apply to the active conversation.
Help.labOverviewMessage: This page summarizes whether datasets, evaluations, and classifier tooling are enabled on the server.
Help.labOverviewDetails: Use the cards below to decide what to run next; deeper workflows live in each Lab subsection.
Help.labExperimentalDatasetMessage: Templates match the evaluation workbook layout for each benchmark family.
Help.labExperimentalDatasetDetails: Uploads are validated on the server; invalid files return structured errors without creating a dataset row.
Help.labEvalRunnerMessage: Choose a compatible workbook, select models or presets, and run. Live results load automatically when the job completes.
Help.labEvalRunnerDetails: Progress updates appear on this page while the job runs. For multi-model runs, each model is scored separately and compared in the results table.
Help.registryHelpMessage: Activation wires one trained classifier model to the project you picked.
Help.registryHelpDetails: Runtime updates apply only to that project's classifier configuration (`classifierModelId`). Nothing silently edits presets elsewhere—you confirm explicitly. **Name** is the label you chose when training; **Tag** is the classifier-service model id sent as `classifierModelId` (e.g. `default` or a short id). The table row **id** (UUID) is only for this app's registry API.
Help.settingsAppearanceMessage: Theme affects this browser only. Language switches apply across settings and navigation.
Help.settingsAppearanceDetails: Preferences sync when you use Appearance & language from the header menu too.
Help.settingsAppearanceInline: Tip: system theme follows your OS light/dark mode.

Panel.title: Tips
Panel.body: Open Activity (history icon) for recent steps and contextual details. Contextual help icons appear next to dense controls.

PrivacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPolicy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how personal data is processed in RAG Console, a web application developed as part of an academic Final Degree Project. The application allows users to configure intelligent assistants based on language models, upload documents, consult them through natural language questions and evaluate different assistant configurations.
PrivacyPolicy.dataProcessing: The application may process account data, authentication data, project data, uploaded documents, extracted text, document metadata, conversation data, evaluation results and technical diagnostic information. This data is processed to create and manage user accounts, authenticate users, maintain secure sessions, organise projects, process uploaded documents, generate document-based answers, store conversations, configure assistant behaviour, execute evaluations, detect errors and support academic validation of the system.
PrivacyPolicy.userResponsibility: Users are responsible for ensuring that they have the right to upload and process the documents they add to the application. Uploaded documents may be processed to extract text, metadata and searchable representations. Assistant answers are generated from the available document content and selected configuration, but they may contain mistakes, incomplete interpretations or unsupported statements. Important information should always be verified against the original documents.
PrivacyPolicy.modelServices: The system may use local or configured language model services to generate answers and embeddings. If external model providers are enabled in the future, users must be informed before document content or questions are sent to those providers.
PrivacyPolicy.dataRetention: Personal data is kept only for as long as necessary to provide the application features, support academic evaluation, maintain security or preserve justified technical evidence. Users may request access, correction, deletion, restriction, portability where applicable and objection where legally applicable.
PrivacyPolicy.security: The application includes technical measures such as authentication, protected routes, restricted administrative access and user/project separation. However, this academic version is not certified as a production-grade system and must not be presented as a complete legal compliance solution without further legal, organisational and security review.

Terms.title: Terms and Conditions
Terms.intro: These Terms and Conditions regulate the use of RAG Console, a web application developed as part of an academic Final Degree Project. By creating an account or using the application, the user accepts these terms.
Terms.purpose: RAG Console allows users to create projects, upload documents, configure assistant behaviour, ask questions about uploaded documents and evaluate different assistant configurations. The application is intended for academic, experimental and demonstrative use. It is not provided as a commercial production service.
Terms.userObligations: Users must provide accurate account information, keep their credentials secure and use the application lawfully and responsibly. Users must not upload documents they are not authorised to use, upload unlawful or harmful content, attempt to access other users' projects or restricted administrative areas, bypass security mechanisms, interfere with the system operation or use the assistant to generate harmful or misleading content.
Terms.documentResponsibility: Users are responsible for the documents they upload. Uploaded documents may be processed to extract text, metadata and searchable representations required by the assistant. The original documents remain the reference source.
Terms.answerDisclaimer: Assistant answers may be useful, but they may also be incomplete, inaccurate or unsupported by the source documents. The application does not provide legal, financial, administrative, medical or professional advice. Any relevant decision must be checked against the original documents and, where necessary, reviewed by a qualified person.
Terms.labUse: The Research Lab area is used to compare models, embeddings, presets and assistant configurations. Evaluation results are intended for analysis and academic documentation, not as a guarantee that a configuration will always provide correct answers.
Terms.availability: The application may be modified, interrupted or temporarily unavailable due to maintenance, development changes, infrastructure limitations or academic testing. No continuous availability, production service level or commercial support commitment is provided.
Terms.adminAccess: Some areas are restricted to administrator users. Ordinary users must not attempt to access restricted administrative features.
Terms.privacyReference: The processing of personal data is described in the Privacy Policy. Users must read and accept the Privacy Policy before creating an account.
